datasets.name: 5a46887f
datasets.displayName: Top Marathon Events by Distance in Kilometers
queryLines:
SELECT
  event_name,
  event_country_name,
  event_distance_km
FROM
  marathos.gold.dim_event 
WHERE
  event_unit = 'km' or event_unit = 'mi'
ORDER BY
  event_distance_km DESC
LIMIT 5

datasets.name: 59bdb476
datasets.displayName: Top Marathon Events Ranked by Longest Distances
queryLines:
SELECT
  event_name,
  event_country_name,
  event_distance_km
FROM
  marathos.gold.dim_event 
WHERE
  event_unit = 'km' or event_unit = 'mi'
ORDER BY
  event_distance_km DESC
LIMIT 5
